conditions: Wind 5.1 mph from 337° (NNW), gusts up to 9.6 mph.

holes.name: Hole 1
holes.tip: Gentle left-to-right crosswind. A stable disc on hyzer will hold its line.

holes.name: Hole 2
holes.tip: Slight headwind from the left. A neutral to slightly overstable disc on hyzer provides controlled flight.

holes.name: Hole 3
holes.tip: Mostly a headwind. Use a stable disc on a hyzer or flat release to cut through the wind.

holes.name: Hole 4
holes.tip: Similar to Hole 3. A stable to overstable disc thrown with a hyzer will be your best bet.

holes.name: Hole 5
holes.tip: Extra distance available! An understable disc thrown flat or slight anhyzer will glide further.

holes.name: Hole 6
holes.tip: Right-to-left crosswind. A stable to overstable disc with a touch of anhyzer to keep it from drifting too far left.

holes.name: Hole 7
holes.tip: Another headwind from the 11 o'clock. Stable disc and hyzer release to combat the wind.

holes.name: Hole 8
holes.tip: Left-to-right crosswind. A stable disc on hyzer should hold its line and avoid a hard right turn.

holes.name: Hole 9
holes.tip: Slight headwind with left-to-right component. Stable disc flat or slight hyzer will work well.
